title: Akir Metal San Tic Ltd ti was hacked. All confidential information was stolen ransomware incident

victim.name: Akir Metal San Tic Ltd ti was hacked. All confidential information was stolen

extortion.description: Who is akir Metal San Tic Ltd tiAkım Metal produces metal parts in Istanbul for automotive, home appliance, motor, aircraft and defense industries using machining and metal injectionmethods with over 40 years of experience. Since 2011 our R&D Center has been developing projects under Ministry of Science, Industry and Technology'sincentives to create new products, to create differentiation at the market and in order to increase R&D activities and invest in R&D related business areas.Headquarters: 7 Esot Sanayi̇ Si̇tesi̇ L Blok No, Istanbul, Istanbul, TurkeyPhone Number: +90 2126715129Website: www.akimmetal.com.trAkir Metal is one of the most dangerous companies to cooperate with in Turkey. Akım Metal's network has a huge number of vulnerabilities that are not patched and can be used to attack the company's customers and steal confidential data.We have deeply studied Akım Metal's network and claim that cooperation with this company can lead to hacking of all its customers at any moment. Data has been stolen:- NDA documents- Personal data- Insurance data- Financial Documents- Engineering information- Patents, technological developments and RND documents- Confidential customer information- Employee and management correspondence and internal dataAnd other critical documents of the company and its customers.
